zh.lifeSummary: 當Antigone of Gloucester Countess of Tankerville於1424年之前出生在英國米德萊可維斯特明斯特時，她的父親Humphrey of Lancaster Duke of Gloucester33歲，母親Eleanor Cobham14歲。她於大約1436年與Sir Henry Grey 2nd Earl of Tankerville, 7th Lord of Powys結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1450年1月13日在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Antigone of Gloucester Countess of Tankerville于1424年之前出生在英国米德萊可維斯特明斯特时，她的父亲Humphrey of Lancaster Duke of Gloucester33岁，母亲Eleanor Cobham14岁。她于大约1436年与Sir Henry Grey 2nd Earl of Tankerville, 7th Lord of Powys结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1450年1月13日在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: possibly a metonymic occupational name for a fisherman, from orfe, a species of freshwater fish. Alternatively, a habitational name from Urff near Kassel, formerly Orpha.

nameMeanings.name: Antigone
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Classical name in occasional modern use, a compound of anti ‘against, contrary’ + gen-, gon- ‘born’. In Greek mythology Antigone was a daughter of Oedipus by his accidental incestuous marriage to his own mother, Jocasta. After her brothers, Eteocles and Polynices, killed each other, she gave funeral rites to both of them, defying the order of her uncle Creon, King of Thebes, that the rebel Polynices should be left unburied. For this, Creon had her buried alive. Its choice as a modern given name is perhaps made with reference to her strength of character in doing what she perceived as right.

en.lifeSummary: When Antigone of Gloucester Countess of Tankerville was born before 1424, in Westminster, Middlesex, England, her father, Humphrey of Lancaster Duke of Gloucester, was 33 and her mother, Eleanor Cobham, was 14. She married Sir Henry Grey 2nd Earl of Tankerville, 7th Lord of Powys about 1436. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 13 January 1450, in Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Antigone of Gloucester Countess of Tankerville est née avant 1424, à Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Humphrey of Lancaster Duke of Gloucester, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Cobham, avait 14 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Henry Grey 2nd Earl of Tankerville, 7th Lord of Powys environ 1436. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 13 janvier 1450, à Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Antigone of Gloucester Countess of Tankerville vor 1424 in Westminster, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Humphrey of Lancaster Duke of Gloucester 33 und ihre Mutter Eleanor Cobham 14. Sie hat um 1436 Sir Henry Grey 2nd Earl of Tankerville, 7th Lord of Powys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 13. Januar 1450 in Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Antigone of Gloucester Countess of Tankerville è nata il prima del 1424 nel Westminster, Middlesex, England, sua padre, Humphrey of Lancaster Duke of Gloucester, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Eleanor Cobham, aveva 14 anni. Lei sposato Sir Henry Grey 2nd Earl of Tankerville, 7th Lord of Powys circa 1436. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 13 gennaio 1450, nel Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.lifeSummary: Antigone of Gloucester Countess of Tankerville(이)가 1424년 이전 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Humphrey of Lancaster Duke of Gloucester(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor Cobham(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 대략 1436년 Sir Henry Grey 2nd Earl of Tankerville, 7th Lord of Powys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1450년 1월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 그루스스터에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Antigone of Gloucester Countess of Tankerville nasceu antes 1424, em Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Humphrey of Lancaster Duke of Gloucester, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Cobham, tinha 14 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Henry Grey 2nd Earl of Tankerville, 7th Lord of Powys aproximadamente 1436. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 13 de janeiro de 1450, em Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Bury St. Edmund's, Suffolk, England: бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Antigone of Gloucester Countess of Tankerville родилась перед 1424 г. в местности вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Humphrey of Lancaster Duke of Gloucester было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Cobham, 14. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Henry Grey 2nd Earl of Tankerville, 7th Lord of Powys около 1436 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 13 января 1450 г. в местности глоусестир, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.
